title: Saksoft Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Saksoft Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Saksoft Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Saksoft Global Group:
Saksoft Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft Global Group!
